title: aster microcephalus var. yezoensis
intro: Aster microcephalus var. yezoensis, also known as the Yezo aster, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) characterized by its small flower heads and hairy leaves. It has been traditionally used in Eastern medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Yezo aster include reducing swelling and pain, as well as protecting against oxidative stress and cell damage. It is commonly prepared as a tea or tincture in herbal medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
